meta.description: Code Roast skill E2E tests — validates on-demand skill loading per language stack
meta.notes: 8 test cases: 4 language-specific (TS file, Python/Go/SQL inline), 2 trigger-phrase variants, 1 negative (no trigger), 1 tone control. Models: internal, minimax-m2.5, kimi-k2.5, glm-5, gemini-3.1-pro-preview, gpt-5.2.

test_cases.description: Roast a real TypeScript file — skill invoked, TS registry loaded, grep patterns run, severity output
test_cases.prompt: Roast the code in autotest/framework/evaluator.ts — give me the full sin inventory with severity levels.

test_cases.description: Roast inline Python with deliberate PY-01 (mutable default), PY-02 (bare except), PY-08 (os.system) sins
Roast inline Go with deliberate GO-01 (ignored error), GO-06 (stutter), GO-16 (unbounded goroutine) sins
Roast inline SQL with deliberate SQL-01 (SELECT *), SQL-08 (OFFSET), SQL-09 (injection) sins
test_cases.prompt:
Roast these SQL queries:

```sql
-- Query 1: Get user by name
SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = '" + userName + "' AND deleted = false;

-- Query 2: Paginated orders
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = 'active' ORDER BY created_at OFFSET 50000 LIMIT 20;
```

test_cases.description: Alternative trigger phrase 'find sins' invokes the code-roast skill
Alternative trigger phrase 'shame my code' invokes the code-roast skill
test_cases.prompt: Shame my code — check autotest/framework/debug-log-parser.ts for problems

test_cases.description: Non-roast question about code should NOT invoke the code-roast skill
test_cases.prompt: What is the purpose of the evaluator.ts file in the autotest framework? Explain its main functions and return types.

test_cases.description: Nuclear tone requested — skill invoked, enhanced roast output with TypeScript sins detected
